name: lineproof
description: Soroban-powered protocol for provably fair, non-transferable waiting lists

scripts.build: pnpm run build:contracts && pnpm run build:sdk
scripts.vercel-build: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @lineproof/sdk build && pnpm --filter @lineproof/frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:contracts && pnpm run test:sdk
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @lineproof/sdk lint && cd contracts && cargo fmt -- --check && cargo clippy
scripts.format: pnpm run format:contracts && pnpm run format:sdk
